testcase.name: test_create_booking_with_reference_image

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'https://example.com/test-ref.jpg' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff51b9598bc0>('reference_image_url') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff51b9598bc0> = {'booking_id': 'book_5185191fd393', 'booking_type': 'tattoo', 'created_at': '2026-04-14T07:06:23.588667+00:00', 'date': '2026-04-14', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_messages_features.py:134: in test_create_booking_with_reference_image assert data.get("reference_image_url") == "https://example.com/test-ref.jpg" E AssertionError: assert None == 'https://example.com/test-ref.jpg' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff51b9598bc0>('reference_image_url') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff51b9598bc0> = {'booking_id': 'book_5185191fd393', 'booking_type': 'tattoo', 'created_at': '2026-04-14T07:06:23.588667+00:00', 'date': '2026-04-14', ...}.get
